issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and other workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating double tasks across pre-referral, post-referral, and sale pending workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot, which caused leads to qualify for multiple workflow branches simultaneously. HubSpot support was engaged and the issue was resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the extra duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral weekly check-in tasks for deals that had already been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not correctly excluding these terminal deal stages as suppression criteria. A tweak to the workflow filters was made to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually delete any outstanding post-referral tasks for deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage reverted and reset to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed (due to a fallen contract), and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was missing from the workflow's re-enrollment criteria. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to include this trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that went back to Offer Accepted a second time during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on a deal
issues.desc: After a loan officer change on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO instead of the updated one. The correct LO was reflected in Dash but not in HubSpot-triggered emails. The issue was identified as a product-level problem and was resolved by Luis.
issues.workaround: For any deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually verify that outgoing emails reference the correct loan officer and resend if needed.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow not triggering tasks after referral acceptance
issues.desc: An HA received no post-referral workflow tasks after a referral was made and accepted on March 18th. The root cause was a data-pulling error that prevented the workflow filter from evaluating correctly, causing the enrollment to fail. The issue was escalated to product for resolution.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll affected deals into the post-referral workflow and complete any missed tasks for leads referred after March 18th.

issues.title: Buyer credit SMS sent in Offer Accepted stage without credit amount populated
issues.desc: An SMS notifying buyers of their credit amount was firing in the Offer Accepted deal stage before closing information had been submitted, resulting in a message with no dollar amount. The SMS should only send in the Sale Pending stage once the credit amount is calculable. The issue was confirmed to be a Dash-triggered communication and was escalated to product.
issues.workaround: For any buyers who received the incomplete credit SMS during the impact window, manually send a corrected message with the accurate credit amount once closing info is submitted.
